remarks: The Quartier reimagines timeless luxury through 21 bespoke residences. Experience the rarest offering in New Canaan: East Penthouse B at The Quartier. Commanding nearly 3,300 square feet of meticulously designed living space, this custom 3-bedroom, 3.5 bath Penthouse represents the definitive fusion of classic architectural integrity and sustainable, high-tech innovation. Access is private via a dedicated elevator that opens into a grand interior defined by soaring cathedral ceilings, 7" wide-plank white oak flooring, a gas fireplace, and a sun-drenched floor plan that flows effortlessly with an expansive private terrace overlooking the plaza gardens. The home is a masterclass in craftsmanship, anchored by a professional-grade kitchen featuring custom Leicht cabinetry, quartzite counters, Watermark fixtures, alongside a "Zen" primary suite designed as a true spa-inspired sanctuary. Life at The Quartier is curated for effortless, white-glove convenience, offering residents an elite suite of amenities including a full-time concierge, a professional fitness studio, a state-of-the-art golf simulator, and secure indoor parking with private electric charging. Perfectly positioned just steps from premier dining and the NYC train, this residence offers a singular "lock-and-leave" lifestyle for the discerning buyer who demands the very best of New Canaan.
